summary: Completed comprehensive testing of POS Caisse Pro application. All 10 main features tested. Backend: 16/16 tests passed. Frontend: All core flows working with minor issues.

console_warnings.issue: Duplicate React keys in product list
console_warnings.details: 140 products in DB but only 81 unique IDs. Duplicate IDs: spaghetti_accomp, poisson, chawarma_viande, sauce_goussi, etc.
console_warnings.impact: React warning 'Encountered two children with the same key' - may cause rendering issues
console_warnings.fix: Clean up duplicate products in database or use unique keys (e.g., MongoDB _id)

console_warnings.location: Multiple modals (subscription form, payment modals, new table modal)
console_warnings.note: React accessibility warning - does not affect functionality

console_warnings.issue: HTML hydration error - tr cannot be child of span
console_warnings.note: May cause hydration issues in SSR but works in client-side rendering

passed_tests: ✅ Feature 1: Login Gérante (PIN 0000) - Successfully logged in as 'Mères AHOUANDJINOU' with Manager badge
✅ Feature 2: Créer une nouvelle table - Table 5 created successfully, 'Table 5 ouverte !' toast shown
✅ Feature 3: Ajouter des produits - Products added to order (Salade niçoise 4,000 F), catalog with Plats/Accomp/Jeux/Bar/Location/Autres categories
✅ Feature 4: Suivi de table persiste - Table 5 persists after invoice creation, shows in Tables tab with details (Serveur, Client, Articles, Total, Durée, Statut)
✅ Feature 5: Impression (boutons visibles pour gérante) - Print buttons visible: Cuisine, Bar, Jeux, Bon buttons on invoice card
✅ Feature 6: Onglet Factures - Shows pending invoices with 'Demander modif.' button for servers, 'Bon' button for managers
✅ Feature 7: Onglet Tables - Shows 'Suivi des Tables' with stats (occupées/libres/durée), table grid (1-20), and 'Détails des Tables Occupées' table
✅ Feature 8: Onglet Abonnements - Shows alerts (2 overdue: Canal+ Access 15,000F, Internet Orange Business 25,000F), stats, subscription cards with Payer/Edit/Delete buttons
✅ Feature 9: QR code de partage - 'Partager Caisse Pro' modal with QR code, URL input, 'Télécharger QR' and 'Partager' buttons
✅ Feature 10: Modal 'Code oublié' - Shows 'Code et identifiant oublié' modal with contact info: L'Administrateur ou la Gérante, +229 01 4147 0000
action_items: MEDIUM: Clean up duplicate products in database - 140 products but only 81 unique IDs causing React key warnings
LOW: Add aria-describedby to DialogContent components for accessibility
LOW: Fix HTML structure in TablesTab.jsx - tr elements wrapped in span causing hydration warnings
critical_code_review_comments: Duplicate product IDs in database causing React key warnings - need to deduplicate or use unique keys
Product sync logic may be creating duplicates when syncing default products
seed_data_existing: 2 subscriptions: Internet Orange Business (25,000 F) and Canal+ Access (15,000 F), both overdue
seed_data_creation: Created test invoice EM-20260330-0001 during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All main POS features working. Key findings: (1) Login works for all roles (Gérante PIN 0000, Serveur PIN 1234, Admin password Caisse2026), (2) Table creation and tracking working, (3) Invoice creation and validation flow working, (4) Print buttons correctly shown for managers only, (5) Subscriptions tab with alerts working, (6) QR code share modal working. Main issue: duplicate products in database causing React key warnings.

login_gerante.notes: PIN 0000 logs in as Mères AHOUANDJINOU with Manager badge

login_serveur.notes: PIN 1234 logs in as Marie Dupont with Serveur badge

login_admin.notes: Password Caisse2026 logs in as Administrateur

forgot_code_modal.notes: Shows contact info for Admin/Gérante with phone +229 01 4147 0000

create_table.notes: Modal shows T1-T20 with Disponible/Occupée indicators

add_products.notes: Products catalog with categories, search, quantity controls

table_tracking.notes: Tables tab shows occupied tables with details (serveur, client, articles, total, durée)

create_invoice.notes: 'Bon de commande envoyé à la cuisine !' toast, invoice appears in Factures list

print_buttons.notes: Cuisine/Bar/Jeux/Bon buttons visible for managers, hidden for servers

validate_invoice.notes: 'Bon' button transforms pending invoice to validated

subscriptions.notes: Alerts, stats, subscription cards with Payer/Edit/Delete buttons

qr_share.notes: QR code modal with download and share buttons
